title: IREN jumps 16% after raising AI cloud revenue target above $4B
summary: The Bitcoin miner raised its year-end AI cloud revenue target to more than $4 billion after signing $2.8 billion in new contracts with AI developers.

title: Peter Brandt predicts the exact day Bitcoin’s bear market will be over
summary: Renowned trading analyst Peter Brandt says investing in Bitcoin today, will pay off much better in two to three years than buying AI stocks at current prices.

title: Stocks Get Lift From Chipmakers as Oil Rally Wanes: Markets Wrap
summary: A bounce in chipmakers drove Wall Street gains, with stocks also rising as an oil rally faded on hopes for a revival of a peace deal between the US and Iran that has all-but collapsed amid an escalation of hostilities.

title: Alkegen Plans Prepackaged Bankruptcy in Deal for Fresh Cash
summary: Alkegen has signed a restructuring deal with lenders that will inject the specialty materials maker with new money and slash its debt load by about $3.1 billion.

Strive (ASST) Adds 21 Bitcoin as Treasury Reaches 19,921 BTC and Cash Climbs to $157 Million
Strive (ASST) bought 21 bitcoin for about $1.3 million last week, increasing its treasury to 19,921 BTC while cash reserves rose to $157.4 million, according to a Monday SEC filing.

title: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
summary: An attacker used a flash loan to distort the bridge's Solana stablecoin pools before moving the proceeds to Ethereum, security firms said.

title: Morning Minute: Hyperliquid Opens Prediction Markets to Anyone in HIP-4 Upgrade
summary: Plus, a selloff in Oil has markets looking green into the Monday open. And PUMP is leading all alt movers on the week at a surprising time.

title: Benchmark backs Exodus after 25% workforce cut, says stablecoin pivot is being overlooked
summary: Late Friday afternoon, Exodus said it expects the restructuring to generate $10 million to $13 million in annualized cost savings.

title: Hut 8 fully commercializes 1 GW Texas AI campus with second $9.8B lease as IREN signs $2.8B in contracts; shares climb double digits
summary: Hut 8 and IREN shares climb on fresh AI data center deals worth billions as the bitcoin-to-AI pivot continues to accelerate.
